info.title: AISP Sandbox
info.description: This is KB REST API supposed to be used by AISP (Account Information Service Provider) to retrieve the list of client's accounts, account balance and transaction history

get.description: Returns the list of accounts of the logged-in client sorted and paged according to the  request parameters

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode), 0 is default

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The list of field to be used to sort by delimiter by comma ordered by significance

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sorting methods (asc, desc). The order matches the order of the fields in the sorting parameter

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each request specified by TPP. It is recommended to use a UUID format with a length of 36 to 60 characters.

parameters.name: User-Involved
parameters.description: The flag identifies if the end user is online and the request was made based on his activity.

parameters.name: TPP-Name
parameters.description: The name of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘ Star corporation, a.s.’.

parameters.name: TPP-Identification
parameters.description: The identification (licence number) of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘CZ013574-15’.

400.description: Invalid input. Please check input parameters and headers.

get.description: Returns the current account balance of the client's account

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Account number in hashed format

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: ISO code for the currency the balance should be returned in (if not specified the balance is returned in the account's currency)

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each request specified by TPP. It is recommended to use a UUID format with a length of 36 to 60 characters.

parameters.name: User-Involved
parameters.description: The flag identifies if the end user is online and the request was made based on his activity.

parameters.name: TPP-Name
parameters.description: The name of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘ Star corporation, a.s.’.

parameters.name: TPP-Identification
parameters.description: The identification (licence number) of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘CZ013574-15’.

400.description: Invalid input. Please check input parameters and headers.

get.description: Returns the history of transactions for specified client's account

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Account number in hashed format

parameters.name: fromDate
parameters.description: Starting (first) date of the range of the filtered transactions

parameters.name: toDate
parameters.description: Ending (last) date of the range of the filtered transactions

parameters.name: currency
parameters.description: ISO code for the currency the balance should be returned in (if not specified the balance is returned in the account's currency)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode), 0 is default

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The list of field to be used to sort by delimiter by comma ordered by significance

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sorting methods (asc, desc). The order matches the order of the fields in the sorting parameter

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each request specified by TPP. It is recommended to use a UUID format with a length of 36 to 60 characters.

parameters.name: User-Involved
parameters.description: The flag identifies if the end user is online and the request was made based on his activity.

parameters.name: TPP-Name
parameters.description: The name of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘ \ Star corporation, a.s.’.

parameters.name: TPP-Identification
parameters.description: The identification (licence number) of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘CZ013574-15’.

400.description: Invalid input. Please check input parameters and headers.

get.description: Returns the list of standing orders of the logged-in client sorted and paged according to the  request parameters

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each request specified by TPP. It is recommended to use a UUID format with a length of 36 to 60 characters.

parameters.name: User-Involved
parameters.description: The flag identifies if the end user is online and the request was made based on his activity.

parameters.name: TPP-Name
parameters.description: The name of the original TPP that created the request. Eg. ‘ Star corporation, a.s.’.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode), 0 is default

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The list of field to be used to sort by delimiter by comma ordered by significance

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of sorting methods (ASC, DESC). The order matches the order of the fields in the sorting parameter

get.description: Resource for get detail about the standing order. It is at the choice of each bank whether to return details of any client standing order or just those that the client has established through a particular TPP.

parameters.name: transactionIdentification
parameters.description: Standing order unique identification. Sample values can be found in the response of the resource "List of standing orders". For example: "5dff73c141aa4fd88adba6ebfe0b019f".

parameters.name: X-Request-Id
parameters.description: Unique identifier for each request specified by TPP. It is recommended to use a UUID format with a length of 36 to 60 characters.

parameters.name: User-Involved
parameters.description: The flag identifies if the end user is online and the request was made based on his activity.

parameters.name: TPP-Name
parameters.description: The name of the original TPP that created the   request. Eg. ?Star corporation, a.s.?.

TransactionAmount.title: TransactionAmount
TransactionAmount.description: The total transaction amount in the transaction's currency (number of decimal places according to ISO 4217 and relevant currencies)

InstructionIdentification.description: Payment identification entered by a third party, or a constant symbol may be entered.

stoppages.description: List of months where there is no payment (only applicable with interval IRREGULAR).

StandingOrderException.description: Elements defining exceptions to executing a standing order.

Stoppage.description: Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

validFromDate.description: Start date of one break period. Standing order will not be processed. Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

validToDate.description: End date of one break period. Standing order will not be processed to this date. Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

lastExecutionDate.description: Date when the standing order will be terminated. Null value responds to ending by the user.

maxIterations.description: Maximum amount to be transferred using the standing order. Only applicable in combination with executionMode AFTER_MAX_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED.

alias.description: Description resp. the user-defined standing order payment name.

openDate.description: Standing order cretion date. Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

lastDate.description: Standing order last payment date. Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

StandingOrder.description: Structure describing the parameters of the standing orders.

mode.description:
The execution mode defines when or how standing order will be cancelled, processed the last time.
Possible values: UNTIL_DATE (standing order is valid until specific date - field lastExecutionDate),
UNTIL_CANCELLATION (standing order is valid forever and must be cancelled by client), 
AFTER_MAX_ITERATION_EXCEEDED (certain count of executions is specified - field maxIterations) or 
MAX_AMOUNT_EXCEEDED (maximum amount which can be transferred for this order is specified, 
if next iteration would exceed this amount it is not executed - field maxAmount).

modeDue.description:
The execution due mode defines how the date when order should be executed is specified.
Possible values: DUE_DAY_OF_MONTH (specific number of day in the month is defined) or
DUE_OR_BEFORE_DAY_OF_MONTH (is defined as a specific day of the month or 
the previous day if the day falls on a non-banking day) or DUE_OR_NEXT_DAY_OF_MONTH 
(is defined as a specific day of the month or the next day if the day falls on a non-banking day) or  
DUE_LAST_DAY_OF_MONTH (order is executed on last day of particular month).

interval.description:
Execution interval defines how often order is executed.
Possible values: DAILY, WEEKLY, BI_WEEKLY, MONTHLY, BI_MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, HALFYEARLY, YEARLY, IRREGULAR.

Execution.description: Features of execution a standing order for payment.

requestedExecutionDate.description: Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification}).

additionalRemittanceInformation.description:
Presence: [0..1]
Definition: Additional free text information for payer

RemittanceInformationCommon.description: Unstructured message for the recipient and information that allows matching payments with items.

StructuredRemittanceInformation.description:
Presence only in domestic payment: [0..3]
Definition: Information allowing the match of the variable symbol,
specific symbol, or a constant symbol for the items to deal with.
Structured Remittance Information can be used to fill a maximum of one
variable symbol, one specific symbol, or one constant symbol.

reference.description:
Fields starting with
VS: (for variable symbol) or
SS: (for specific symbol) or
KS: (for constant symbol).
In one iteration of the reference field, all three symbols, each on its own line, always only one repeat of each symbol.

items.description:
Presence only in domestic payment: [0..1]
Ex.: The value of the specific symbol is recorded as "SS:maximum10" digits (SS:3451859072).

PaymentAccountCommon.description:
Presence: [1..1]
Definition: Unambiguous identification of the creditor's account on which a debit or credit
item will be made as a result of the transaction.

name.description: Payer account name. Attribute will only be provided within Standing Order detail info (/standingorders/{transactionIdentification})

DebtorAccount.description: Information on the account payer. It is according to the payment direction, and filled in in the case of counterparty.

AccountIdentificationSO.title: AccountIdentificationSO
AccountIdentificationSO.description: The identification information of the client's account

PageSize.title: PageSize
PageSize.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

PageNumber.title: PageNumber
PageNumber.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode)

PageCount.title: PageCount
PageCount.description: The total number of pages that can be returned (in pagination mode)

StandingOrderList.title: StandingOrderListResponse
StandingOrderList.description: Paged list of client?s standing orders.

BalanceTypeCode.title: BalanceTypeCode
BalanceTypeCode.description: Code of the account balance type

CreditDebitIndicator.title: CreditDebitIndicator
CreditDebitIndicator.description: Indicates whether the account balance is positive or negative

Bearer.title: Bearer
Bearer.description: Information on payment side to which the charges will be applied

AccountIdentification.title: AccountIdentification

other.description: Account Number in national format (without bank code)

AccountIdentification.description: The identification information of the client's account

ServicingBank.title: ServicingBank
ServicingBank.description: The identification information of the bank the account is served by - bankCode - countryCode - bic

Relationship.title: Relationship
Relationship.description: Indicates whether the person is the owner of the bank account or not

IsOwner.title: IsOwner
IsOwner.description: True/false if the authenticated person is/is not the owner (payer) of the account

SuitableScope.title: SuitableScope
SuitableScope.description: Object carrying information about the account's allowed scopes.

Account.title: Account

nameI18N.description: The custom name of the client's account

productI18N.description: The name of the bank's product (of the client's account)

ownersNames.description: Array of name/s of the account holder/s for consumers or trade name/s for commercial clients

Account.description: The full information about client's account

GetAccountListResponse.title: GetAccountListResponse

pageNumber.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode)

pageCount.description: The total number of pages that can be returned (in pagination mode)

pageSize.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

nextPage.description: The number of the next page that can be returned (in pagination mode)

GetAccountListResponse.description: The list of all the client's accounts with full account information

CreditLineAmountType.title: CreditLineAmountType

value.description: The amount of the allowed debit

CreditLineAmountType.description: Credit line amount information (allowed debit amount)

included.description: Indicates whether the allowed debit is included in balance

value.description: The balance amount of the client's account

dateTime.description: The date and time the balance information is valid for

AccountBalance.title: AccountBalance
AccountBalance.description: Account balance for specific balance type

GetAccountBalanceResponse.title: GetAccountBalanceResponse

balances.description: Collection of the client's account balances

GetAccountBalanceResponse.description: The list of all the client's accounts with full account information

TransactionDetails.title: TransactionDetails

value.description: The total transaction amount in the transaction's currency (number of decimal places according to ISO 4217 and relevant currencies)

TransactionDetails.description: Details about the transaction (amount and currency)

BookingDate.title: BookingDate

date.description: The date and time the event has occured in ISODate or ISODateTime format ("YYYY-MM-DD"/ "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sTZD")

BookingDate.description: The date the payment was processed/accounted by bank in ISODate or ISODateTime format ("YYYY-MM-DD"/ "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sTZD")

ValueDate.title: ValueDate

date.description: The date and time the event has occured in ISODate or ISODateTime format ("YYYY-MM-DD"/ "YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sTZD")

ValueDate.description: The payment due date in ISODate or ISODateTime format ("YYYY-MM-DD"/"YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sTZD")

BankTransactionProprietary.title: BankTransactionProprietary

code.description: Code of the transaction defined by CBA (Czech Bank Association) associated with specific payment. Every bank uses its own LOV for transaction codes which is derived from 1st to 3rd level of the transaction codes LOV defined by CBA standar fo CAMT.053

issuer.description: The identification of the issuer of the transaction codes LOV

BankTransactionProprietary.description: The proprietary type of the transaction defined by CBA (Czech Bank Association)

BankTransactionCodeType.title: BankTransactionCodeType
BankTransactionCodeType.description: The type of the transaction defined by CBA (Czech Bank Association)

References.title: References

messageIdentification.description: Identification of the payment assigned by client while payment was submitted or the payment order number from payment history

accountServicerReference.description: Identification of the payment assigned by bank, i.e. while payment was submitted via internet banking service

paymentInformationIdentification.description: Other identification of the payment assigned by bank, i.e. for card transaction it may be the sequence number of the payment card or there can be provided specific symbol

endToEndIdentification.description: Unique identification of the payment/transaction provided by the client who initiated the payment and is transfered unchanged via the whole payment chain or there can be provided variable symbol

mandateIdentification.description: Unique mandate reference for SEPA collection or there can be provided constant symbol

chequeNumber.description: There may be provided cheque number for cheque operations or payment card number with asterisks for card operations. Payment card number is always provided in "************1234" format.

clearingSystemReference.description: Number value defined by bank which identifies the type of payment or the string value/name of the payment type. There may be provided identification of card association for card payments.

References.description: Set of the references, which uniquely identifies the payment/transaction

InstructedAmount.title: InstructedAmount
InstructedAmount.description: Payment amount in specified currency, which was requested by client for money transfer

CurrencyExchange.title: CurrencyExchange

exchangeRate.description: The exchange rate value to be used for conversion

CurrencyExchange.description: Exchange rate from source currency (the payer's account currency) and specified payment currency

CounterValueAmount.title: CounterValueAmount
CounterValueAmount.description: Payment amount in the payer's account currency, which was requested by client for money transfer

PartyAddress.title: PartyAddress
PartyAddress.description: Postal address of creditor or debtor

TransactionParty.title: TransactionParty
TransactionParty.description: Identification of the party who is involved in the transaction (creditor or debtor, depends on the transaction direction)

TransactionAccountIdentification.title: TransactionAccountIdentification
TransactionAccountIdentification.description: The identification information of the client's account for transaction

name.description: Name of the transaction party's account

RelatedTransactionParties.title: RelatedTransactionParties
RelatedTransactionParties.description: Provides information about both transaction parties (creditor/debtor) and their accounts

AgentAddress.title: AgentAddress
AgentAddress.description: Postal address of creditor's or debtor's bank

FinancialInstitutionIdentification.title: FinancialInstitutionIdentification

name.description: Name of the creditor's or debtor's bank from SWIFT directory

FinancialInstitutionIdentification.description: Creditor's or debtor's bank identification in international format

RelatedTransactionAgents.title: RelatedTransactionAgents
RelatedTransactionAgents.description: Creditor's (payer's) and debtor's (payee's) bank identification information

code.description: Purpose code of the payment specified within the payment order

proprietary.description: Purpose of the payment in an unstructured format specified within the payment order

additionalTransactionInformation.description: Additional information about transaction provided by bank
additionalTransactionInformation.example: 8201701069595 BIC: GIBACZPXXXX; #71A# SHA ZALOHA DLE SMLOUVY O DODAVKACH

entryReference.description: Payment identification number assigned by bank

reversalIndicator.description: Indicates whether the transaction is of "storno" type or not

status.description: Status of the payment on account from bank point of view. Booked/posted items are marked as "BOOK", blocked items are marked as "PDNG"

GeAccountTransactionsResponse.title: GeAccountTransactionsResponse

pageNumber.description: The page number to be returned (in pagination mode)

pageCount.description: The total number of pages that can be returned (in pagination mode)

pageSize.description: The number of rows per page (in pagination mode)

nextPage.description: The number of the next page that can be returned (in pagination mode)

transactions.description: The list of account transactions with their details

GeAccountTransactionsResponse.description: The list of transactions on the client's account according to the filter set in the request

error.description: Code of the error that occured. Errors are given as codes of WORDS_AND_UNDERSCORES

scope.description: If error is related to one of the fields in request this field contains identification of the field.

message.description: Error message in plain text format

value.description: The total transaction amount in the transaction's currency (number of decimal places according to ISO 4217 and relevant currencies)

Charges.title: Charges
Charges.description: Information about charge/fee applied for payment

ClearingSystemIdentification.title: ClearingSystemIdentification

code.description: Bank code in local payment system format

proprietary.description: Other identification of the bank in an unstructured format in local payment system format

ClearingSystemIdentification.description: Bank identification in local payment system

ClearingSystemMemberIdentification.title: ClearingSystemMemberIdentification
ClearingSystemMemberIdentification.description: Bank code in national format (national code, local payment system code or text description)

Identification.title: Identification
Identification.description: Debtor's or creditor's identification (private or organisation)

identification.description: Other identification of the private party in an unstructured format

issuer.description: The name of the entity who defined/assigned the schemaName

identification.description: Other identification of the organisation party in an unstructured format

issuer.description: The name of the entity who defined/assigned the schemaName

Other2.title: Other2

identification.description: Account Number in national format (without bank code)

Other2.description: Account number identification in different or local format

unstructured.description: Supplementary information about payment in unstructured format

SchemaName.title: SchemaName

code.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as private person in ISO LOV code format

proprietary.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as private person in text format

SchemaName.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as private person

SchemaName1.title: SchemaName1

code.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as organisation person in ISO LOV code format

proprietary.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as organisation person in text format

SchemaName1.description: Type code for creditor/debtor identification as organisation person

AccessToken.description: PSD2 API OAuth2 access token can be generated by PSD2 OAuth2 API.
